# prompt-input

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Free-form text input at the bottom of the conversation view. Enter sends a turn; fork buttons reuse the draft as the new conversation's initial prompt.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Conversation.PromptInput` → `PromptInput`
  - Uses: `conversations.useConversation`, `notifications.toast`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
